## 1. GRANT OF RIGHTS

The Subject hereby grants the Licensee the right and permission to use the Subject's likeness, image, voice, and appearance as captured in photographs, video recordings, audio recordings, and any other media (collectively, "Media") taken on or about [DATE OF CAPTURE] at [LOCATION OF CAPTURE].

---

## 2. SCOPE OF USE

### 2.1 Permitted Uses (select all that apply)

- [ ] **Personal use only** (private viewing, personal archives, non-public sharing with friends and family)
- [ ] **Social media posting** (Instagram, TikTok, Twitter/X, Facebook, YouTube, LinkedIn, and similar platforms)
- [ ] **Website and blog use** (personal or business websites, online portfolios, blog posts)
- [ ] **Print materials** (brochures, flyers, posters, business cards, magazines, newspapers)
- [ ] **Commercial advertising** (paid advertisements, sponsored content, product marketing)
- [ ] **Broadcast media** (television, film, streaming platforms, documentary)
- [ ] **Educational purposes** (training materials, presentations, academic publications)
- [ ] **Editorial use** (news coverage, journalism, editorial commentary)
- [ ] **Portfolio and promotional** (photographer/videographer portfolio, demo reel, case studies)
- [ ] **All lawful purposes** (unrestricted use in any medium, current or future)

### 2.2 Restrictions

The Licensee shall NOT use the Media in the following ways:
- [ ] Pornographic, obscene, or sexually explicit content
- [ ] Content that defames, disparages, or embarrasses the Subject
- [ ] Endorsement of products, services, or causes without the Subject's specific written consent
- [ ] Political campaigns or advocacy without the Subject's specific written consent
- [ ] Any context that implies the Subject has a medical condition, criminal history, or other stigmatizing attribute unless factually accurate and consented to
- [ ] Other restrictions: [SPECIFY]

---

## 3. EDITING AND MODIFICATION

The Subject grants the Licensee permission to:

- [ ] Use Media as captured, without modification
- [ ] Edit, crop, resize, color-correct, and make minor adjustments
- [ ] Substantially alter, composite, digitally manipulate, or create derivative works
- [ ] Use AI-generated modifications or enhancements (deepfake-style alterations are excluded unless separately agreed)

**The Licensee shall NOT alter the Media in a way that misrepresents the Subject's appearance, identity, or actions in a manner that would be considered misleading or defamatory.**

---

## 7. REVOCATION

a) **Revocable release:** The Subject may revoke this release at any time by providing written notice to the Licensee. Upon revocation, the Licensee shall cease all NEW uses of the Media within [NUMBER: e.g., 30] days. Uses already in circulation (published posts, printed materials, broadcast content) are not required to be recalled, but no new distribution shall occur.

b) **Irrevocable release (if selected):**
- [ ] This release is irrevocable for the duration specified in Section 4. The Subject waives the right to revoke once the Media has been published or distributed.

---

## 8. REPRESENTATIONS AND WARRANTIES

**The Subject represents that:**
a) They are at least eighteen (18) years of age (or a parent/guardian has signed on behalf of a minor below).
b) They have the full right and authority to grant the permissions in this Agreement.
c) They are not bound by any other agreement that would conflict with this release.

**The Licensee represents that:**

b) They will comply with all applicable laws regarding the use of the Media.
